danger_signals.visual_form: Ride visual damage or explosion effect on-screen
danger_signals.meaning: Maintenance neglect has reached critical state; visitor safety compromised; revenue loss imminent

danger_signals.visual_form: Visual debris/clutter accumulation on park pathways
danger_signals.meaning: Insufficient handymen/cleaning staff; park hygiene deteriorating; visitor satisfaction declining

danger_signals.visual_form: Visual thugs present in park; balloon popping, food theft, entertainer attacks displayed
danger_signals.meaning: Insufficient security staff; crime rate elevated; visitor experience under threat

danger_signals.visual_form: Visitor behavior changes; reduced foot traffic; visual mood indicators
danger_signals.meaning: Park conditions (rides, cleanliness, pricing, entertainment) below acceptable threshold

danger_signals.visual_form: UI notification; staff absence from workstations; operational disruption visual feedback
danger_signals.meaning: Wage/goods price agreement breakdown; operational capacity reduced; economic negotiation failed

safety_signals.visual_form: Rides display clean, functional visual state; no damage indicators
safety_signals.meaning: Regular maintenance schedule followed; visitor safety assured; revenue generation stable

safety_signals.visual_form: Park floors and walkways visually clear and orderly
safety_signals.meaning: Adequate handymen/cleaning staff deployed; hygiene standards met; visitor satisfaction supported

safety_signals.visual_form: Security guards visibly patrolling park areas
safety_signals.meaning: Crime deterrent active; vandalism prevention in effect; visitor safety perception high

safety_signals.visual_form: High foot traffic; visitors using rides, shops, attractions; animated park activity
safety_signals.meaning: Park attractions appeal sufficient; visitor satisfaction positive; revenue generation active

safety_signals.visual_form: Entertainers, mechanics, and shop attendants visibly present at assigned locations
safety_signals.meaning: Full staffing complement deployed; operational capacity at maximum; labor negotiations successful

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Rival park operators (competitor parks at end-of-year evaluation)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Park infrastructure owned by player; custom-configured rides, shops, and facilities reflect player decisions; park layout and theming reflect player investment

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Potential thugs/vandals (emerge when park conditions degrade)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Crowds present at attractions; usage of shops and rides; entry via tour bus; visible on pathways and at facilities

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Striking staff (visual absence/non-performance when negotiation fails)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Entertainers perform at show locations; security patrols visible; mechanics maintain rides; handymen clean pathways; shop staff tend registers

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Well-maintained facilities; clean park; active visitor engagement; modern/upgraded attractions visible
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Staff performs duties; visitors arrive regularly; rides operate smoothly; no vandalism; positive end-of-year performance evaluation

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Visible deterioration of facilities; messy pathways; older ride designs; reduced visitor activity
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Staff shortages visible (unmanned stations); visitors depart early; broken rides; increased crime; negative end-of-year evaluation; potential staff strikes

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Environmental themes and settings vary by location: desert environments, glacier/arctic settings, terrain types reflected in park layout and available ride themes
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Economic conditions, weather impacts, land values, and attraction availability shift based on location selection; visitor expectations and ride preferences adapt to regional context

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Newly available ride and shop icons unlock in UI; visual representation of new attractions in catalog
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player gains access to new ride types, staff efficiency improvements, ride durability enhancements, larger bus capacity; operational capabilities expand

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Visitor density on pathways; length of queues at attractions; active entertainment shows in progress; shopping activity visible at stalls
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Repeat visitor arrival; extended stay duration; increased spending on merchandise and food; positive word-of-mouth indicated by continued bus arrivals

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: UI cash display; ability to purchase premium attractions and staff; park expansion and quality upgrades visible
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player capacity to take loans; reinvestment in park improvements; ability to negotiate favorable terms with staff; progression toward sale and relocation

environmental_storytelling.example: Deteriorating rides display visual damage; well-maintained rides appear pristine and safe-looking
Accumulation of visible debris and clutter communicates staff shortage and declining park standards

environmental_storytelling.technique: Visitor behavior changes reflecting park conditions
environmental_storytelling.example: Crowd density and visitor movement patterns indicate satisfaction levels without explicit UI messaging

environmental_storytelling.technique: Geographic theming and seasonal visual variation
environmental_storytelling.example: Desert vs. glacier settings create visually distinct park environments; terrain affects layout and ride placement possibilities

environmental_storytelling.technique: Staff presence/absence as operational status indicator
environmental_storytelling.example: Empty workstations and absent entertainers communicate labor issues and operational breakdown
Visible vandals popping balloons, stealing from shops, attacking entertainers communicate park safety deterioration

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Continues patronage; returns via bus; uses multiple attractions and shops; exhibits extended park stay
Departs early; avoids certain attractions; skips shopping; reduces return visits; vulnerable to thug influence
Pops balloons; steals food from shops; beats up entertainers; damages park reputation; emerges during periods of insufficient security
Performs assigned duty; visible at workstation; contributes to park operations; accepts wages and negotiated terms
Absence from workstation; cessation of duty performance; operational role unfilled; results from wage negotiation failure
Operates smoothly; attracts visitors; generates revenue; displays no damage indicators
Accumulates mechanical wear; eventually fails/explodes; attracts fewer visitors; potential guest injury or death consequences
Visible patrolling park; deters crime; reduces thug activity; maintains visitor sense of safety
Insufficient patrol coverage; unable to prevent crime; thugs operate with reduced resistance; park safety perception degrades

notes: Theme Park uses indirect visual communication for world-state. The game emphasizes emergent storytelling through environmental conditions (cleanliness, ride status, staff visibility) and visitor behavioral responses rather than explicit narrative. Location-based theming (desert, glacier) creates regional identity but does not feature competing factions in traditional sense. The 'threat' is economic competition with rival park operators (judged annually) and internal operational decay (crime, staff strikes, ride failure). Visual manifestations are primarily utilitarian: UI-driven (cash, research, performance metrics) combined with environment density (visitor crowds, staff presence, facility condition). SNES platform limitations constrain visual sophistication; meaning is conveyed through presence/absence of elements and activity density rather than detailed animation or color symbolism.
